Playbook Backend: API/orchestrator + knowledge-base services for embedded app assistants.

Start here:
- README.md
- docs/INDEX.md

Canonical architecture and capability docs:
- docs/backend/services-overview.md
- docs/backend/platform-ownership-split.md
- docs/backend/ios-app-agent-capabilities.md
- docs/backend/kb-service-capabilities.md
- docs/backend/orchestrator-flow.md
- docs/backend/router-map.md
- docs/backend/data-model-map.md
- docs/backend/integration-map-sdk-to-backend.md
- docs/backend/config-env-reference.md
- docs/backend/error-contracts.md

Protocol and integration contracts:
- SDK_INTEGRATION.md

Generated API contracts (source of truth for endpoint signatures):
- docs/generated/openapi/dashboard.openapi.json
- docs/generated/openapi/agent.openapi.json
- docs/generated/openapi/knowledge_bases.openapi.json

Operational runbooks:
- docs/backend/runbooks/local-dev-and-docker.md

Notes:
- Prefer generated OpenAPI files for exact request/response contracts.
- Prefer curated docs for behavior, boundaries, lifecycle, and implementation guidance.
